stories.title: Who's to blame for USMNT's World Cup exit? Rating ...
stories.summary: This USMNT was supposed to be special, but terrible performances throughout the U.S. roster led to a bitter World Cup exit in the round of 16.

stories.title: Belgium handed U.S. a World Cup reality check -- a...
stories.summary: The U.S.'s World Cup dream went up in smoke on Monday, comprehensively dismantled 4-1 by Belgium.

stories.title: USMNT's World Cup dream crushed by Belgium
stories.summary: Even with Folarin Balogun back up front, the United States men's national team crashed out of the World Cup in the round of 16 once again.

stories.title: Stevens cites 'challenging' path for Brown trade
stories.summary: Brad Stevens said Monday that the Celtics traded Jaylen Brown to keep the team competitive and add more optionality with draft assets.

stories.title: 'Sad' Ronaldo exits last WC with 'clear conscience...
stories.summary: An emotional Cristiano Ronaldo said he had a "clear conscience" as he exited his final World Cup as Portugal were eliminated 1-0 by Spain in the round of 16 in Arlington, Texas, on Monday.
